Reports Brief Reports About
☰

New Zealand Attitudes and Values Study

Joseph Bulbulia https://josephbulbulia.netlify.app (Victoria University of Wellington)https://www.wgtn.ac.nz
2021-FEB-28

Contents

  • Questionaire

Figure 1: Sampling from the electoral rol combines with repeated measures within the same people across New Zealand’s social diversity to enable robust inference about stability and change in attitudes and values across New Zealand over time .

The New Zealand Attitudes and Values Study (NZAVS) is a national panel study that Professor Chris G Sibley started in 2009. The team has since grown to over 40 collaborators.

A panel study is a longitudinal study that follows the same individuals over time. A panel study is different from a census, which samples the population as a whole over time, without tracking individuals.

Each year, the NZAVS surveys health, personality, relationships, employment, values, beliefs, and habits within the same people. The most recent wave of the NZAVS has longitudinal responses from over 42,000 New Zealanders. This is about 1% of New Zealand’s adult population.

Time-series data within the same individuals across a diverse population are powerful because they enable a systematic understanding of the complex interplay between human social and psychological processes that occur within each of us as we respond to different life-events as they happen (“natural experiments”) against the background of social and biological processes that unfold gradually over the life-span.

The NZAVS is distinct from other panel studies for the breadth of its survey questions that were purposely crafted to investigate what makes life good, and what imperils these goods, and for its scale, which encompasses 12 longitudinal waves.

The NZAVS maintains an up-to-date contact list as participants move house, change names, change telephone accounts, and change email addresses. The study’s personalised telephone campaigns, holiday cards, and participant prize draws have enabled the NZAVS to maintain a remarkably high annual sample retention rate of 80%. Many longitudinal studies achieve only 20% retention. The high NZAVS retention rate combines with a data-rich questionnaire and 12 waves of data collection to produce a unique intellectual resource. No comparable time-series data source within individuals with such coverage and depth for investigating religion, health, and community-making exists in the world (2021).

Questionaire

  <td colspan=40 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Greaves, L. M., Barlow, F. K., Lee,
  C. H. J., Matike, C. M., Wang, Q., Lindsay, C-J., Case, C. J. B., Sengupta,
  N. K., Huang, Y., Cowie, L. J., Stronge, S., Storey, M., De Souza, L.,

 </tr>

  <td colspan=18 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Fraser, G., Huang, Y., Robinson,

  style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td colspan=39 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Charitable donation amount<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl93 colspan=10 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Hoverd, W. J., &amp;
  Sibley, C. G. (2010). Religious and denominational diversity in New Zealand
  2009.<font class="font9"> New Zealand Sociology, 25, </font><font
  class="font10">59-87.</font></td>
  <td colspan=47 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

  I to catch COVID-19.</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I am willing to strictly follow any and all guidelines
  provided by the Ministry of Health for managing COVID-19 in New Zealand.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think that health risks associated with COVID-19 have been
  wildly exaggerated.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think it is quite likely that COVID-19 was created in a
  laboratory.<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>

 <tr height=20 style='height:15.0pt'>

  style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span></td>

  <td colspan=15 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From:Salmond, C., Crampton,

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-outline-level:2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Have we missed anything important or would you like to
  provide more detail about your experiences? If so, please let us know in the
  box below:</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105 colspan=2 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Finally, have you
  experienced any significant life events in the past year? This is a final
  optional question. Your responses could help us to understand important
  changes in people’s lives that are missed by the specific questions in the
  survey.</td>
  <td colspan=7 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
  <td class=xl158 style='border-top:none'>Coded</td>
  <td class=xl158 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Coded</td>
  <td colspan=60 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Religious education in schools</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Perry, R., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2013). A dual-process motivational model of social and economic policy
  attitudes. Analyses of Social Issues and Public Policy, 13, 262-285.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-outline-level:2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Including religious instruction in Christianity as part of
  the school curriculum.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Religious fundamentalism</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Altemeyer, B., &amp; Hunsberger, B.
  (1992). Authoritarianism, religious fundamentalism, quest, and prejudice. <font
  class="font9">International Journal for the Psychology of Religion, 2, </font><font
  class="font10">113-133.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>God has given mankind a complete, unfailing guide to
  happiness and salvation, which must be totally followed.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>When you get right down to it, there are only two kinds of
  people in the world: the Righteous, who will be rewarded by God; and the
  rest, who will not.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Different religions and philosophies have different versions
  of the truth, and may be equally right in their own way.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Quest orientation</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=11 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Batson, C. D., &amp; Schoenrade, P.
  A. (1991). Measuring religion as quest: 2) reliability concerns. <font
  class="font9">Journal for the Scientific Study of Religion, 30</font><font
  class="font10">, 430-447.</font></td>
  <td colspan=46 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I am constantly questioning my religious beliefs.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>There are many religious issues on which my views are still
  changing.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>As I grow and change I expect my religion also to grow and
  change.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Intrinsic orientation</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=11 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Batson, C. D., &amp; Schoenrade, P.
  A. (1991). Measuring religion as quest: 2) reliability concerns. <font
  class="font9">Journal for the Scientific Study of Religion, 30</font><font
  class="font10">, 430-447.</font></td>
  <td colspan=46 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>My religious beliefs are what really lie behind my whole
  approach to life.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I try hard to carry my religion over into all my other
  dealings in life.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>It is important for me to spend periods of time in private
  thought and meditation.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Extrinsic-personal orientation</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=11 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Batson, C. D., &amp; Schoenrade, P.
  A. (1991). Measuring religion as quest: 2) reliability concerns. <font
  class="font9">Journal for the Scientific Study of Religion, 30</font><font
  class="font10">, 430-447.</font></td>
  <td colspan=46 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The purpose of prayer is to gain relief and protection.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>What religion offers me most is comfort when sorrows and
  misfortune strike.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The purpose of prayer is to secure a happy and peaceful life.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:1;height:
  15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Extrinsic-social orientation</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl89 colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Gorsuch, R. L., &amp;
  McPherson, S. E. (1989). Intrinsic/extrinsic measurement: I/E revised and
  single item scales. Journal for the Scientific Study of Religion, 28,
  348-354.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I go to Church because it helps me to make friends</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I go to Church mostly to spend time with my friends</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I go to church mainly because I enjoy seeing the people I
  know there.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Religious group narcissism</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=15 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: de Zavala, A. G.,
  Cichocka, A., Eidelson, R., &amp; Jayawickreme, N. (2009). Collective
  narcissism and its social consequences. Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 97, 1074-1096.</td>
  <td colspan=42 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I insist upon my religious group/denomination getting the
  respect that is due to it.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>If my religious group/denomination had a major say in the
  world, the world would be a much better place.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The true worth of my religious group/denomination is often
  misunderstood.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>God locus of health control</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl123 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=17 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Wallston, K. A., Malcarne, V. L.,
  Flores, L., Hansdottir, I., Smith, C. A., Stein, M. H., … &amp; Clements, P.
  J. (1999). Does God determine your health? The God locus of health control
  scale. <font class="font9">Cognitive Therapy and Research, 23, </font><font
  class="font10">131-142.</font></td>
  <td colspan=40 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Most things that affect my health happen because of God.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>God is directly responsible for my health getting better or
  worse.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Whatever happens to my health is God’s will.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Attitudes toward religion<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl120 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=18 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Gibson, N. J. S., &amp; Barnes, K.
  (2013). The varieties of religious nones: factor structure and validity of
  the non-religosity scales. Paper presented at: The International Association
  for the Psycholology of Religion, Lausanne, Switzerland.<span
  style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td colspan=39 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I oppose religion in any form.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>All things considered, religion is a cause for good in the
  world.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The teachings of traditional religions are still helpful
  today.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Islamophobia</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl98></td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Islam is a religion of peace.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl134 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl95 colspan=21 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Lee, S. A., Gibbons, J.
  A., Thompson, J. M., &amp; Timani, H. S. (2009). The Islamophobia scale:
  Instrument development and initial validation.&nbsp;The International Journal
  for the Psychology of Religion,&nbsp;19(2), 92-105. [reversed<span
  style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span>item Adapted From:Lee.. Islam is a religion
  of hate.]</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>If I could, I would live in a place where there were no
  Muslims.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl134 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl95 colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Lee, S. A., Gibbons, J.
  A., Thompson, J. M., &amp; Timani, H. S. (2009). The Islamophobia scale:
  Instrument development and initial validation.&nbsp;<font class="font12">The
  International Journal for the Psychology of Religion</font><font
  class="font11">,&nbsp;</font><font class="font12">19</font><font
  class="font11">(2), 92-105.</font></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Muslims in New Zealand should have the right to found Islamic
  schools.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl159>Time Usage (Hours)</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=19 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:1;height:
  14.25pt'>
  <td height=19 class=xl84 style='height:14.25pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Hours spent in activities</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>9</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>10</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>10</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>13</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>13</td>
  <td class=xl109 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>12</td>
  <td class=xl109 style='border-top:none'>15</td>
  <td class=xl109 style='border-top:none'>15</td>
  <td class=xl109 style='border-top:none'>15</td>
  <td colspan=28 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., Luyten, N., Purnomo,
  M., Moberly, A., Wootton, L. W., Hammond, M. D., Sengupta, N., Perry, R.,
  West-Newman, T., Wilson, M. S., McLellan, L., Hoverd, W. J., &amp; Robertson,
  A. (2011). The Mini-IPIP6: Validation and extension of a short measure of the
  Big-Six factors of personality in New Zealand. New Zealand Journal of
  Psychology, 40, 142-159.</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Approach social motivation</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Elliot, A.J., Gable, S.L., &amp;
  Mapes, R.R. (2006). Approach and Avoidance Motivation in the Social Domain. <font
  class="font9">Personality and Social Psychology Bulletin, 32, </font><font
  class="font10">378-391.</font></td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I try to enhance the bonding and intimacy in my close
  relationships.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Avoidance social motivation<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Elliot, A.J., Gable, S.L., &amp;

  class="font10">378-391.</font></td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  14.25pt'>

  <td>Mini-IPIP6 Extraversion</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>

  <td class=xl93 colspan=28 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., Luyten,
  N., Purnomo, M., Moberly, A., Wootton, L. W., Hammond, M. D., Sengupta, N.,
  Perry, R., West-Newman, T., Wilson, M. S., McLellan, L., Hoverd, W. J., &amp;
  Robertson, A. (2011). The Mini-IPIP6: Validation and extension of a short measure
  of the Big-Six factors of personality in New Zealand<font class="font9">. New
  Zealand Journal of Psychology, 40, </font><font class="font10">142-159.</font></td>
  <td colspan=29 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

  15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Mini-IPIP6 Agreeableness (also modelled as empathy facet)</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl93 colspan=28 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., Luyten,
  N., Purnomo, M., Moberly, A., Wootton, L. W., Hammond, M. D., Sengupta, N.,
  Perry, R., West-Newman, T., Wilson, M. S., McLellan, L., Hoverd, W. J., &amp;
  Robertson, A. (2011). The Mini-IPIP6: Validation and extension of a short measure
  of the Big-Six factors of personality in New Zealand<font class="font9">. New
  Zealand Journal of Psychology, 40, </font><font class="font10">142-159.</font></td>
  <td colspan=29 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Am not really interested in others.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

  <td>Mini-IPIP6 Openness to Experience<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>4</td>

  <td class=xl93 colspan=28 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., Luyten,
  N., Purnomo, M., Moberly, A., Wootton, L. W., Hammond, M. D., Sengupta, N.,
  Perry, R., West-Newman, T., Wilson, M. S., McLellan, L., Hoverd, W. J., &amp;
  Robertson, A. (2011). The Mini-IPIP6: Validation and extension of a short measure
  of the Big-Six factors of personality in New Zealand<font class="font9">. New
  Zealand Journal of Psychology, 40, </font><font class="font10">142-159.</font></td>
  <td colspan=29 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Demand the best because I’m worth it.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Honesty-Humility -Modesty Facet</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=57 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Ashton, M. C., &amp; Lee, K.
  (2008). The prediction of honesty-humility-related criteria by the HEXACO and

  Bonacci, J.K., Shelton, J., Exline, J.J., &amp; Bushman, B.J. (2004).

  self-report measure. </font><font class="font9">Journal of Personality
  Assessment, 83, </font><font class="font10">29-45; Sibley, C. G., Luyten, N.,
  Purnomo, M., Moberly, A., Wootton, L. W., Hammond, M. D., Sengupta, N.,
  Perry, R., Hoverd, W. J., &amp; Robertson, A. (2010). The Mini-IPIP6:
  Validation and extension of a short measure of the Big-Six factors of
  personality. Manuscript submitted for publication.</font></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I want people to know that I am an important person of high
  status.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I am an ordinary person who is no better than others.<span
  style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I wouldn’t want people to treat me as though I were superior
  to them.<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think that I am entitled to more respect than the average
  person is.<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Disgust sensitivity</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td colspan=18 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted from: Olatunji, B. O.,
  Williams, N. L., Tolin, D. F., Sawchuck, C. N., Abramowitz, J. S., Lohr, J.
  M., et al. (2007). The disgust scale: Item analysis, factor structure, and
  suggestions for refinement. <font class="font8">Psychological Assessment.</font><font
  class="font6"> 19, 281-297.</font></td>
  <td colspan=39 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Bad smells, messes, dead animals and rotten food absolutely
  disgust me.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Get deeply immersed in music.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Cognitive Consistency</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl96 colspan=9 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Nichols, A. L., &amp;
  Webster, G. D. (under review). The single-item need for consistency scale. <font
  class="font7">Personality and Individual Differences.</font></td>
  <td colspan=48 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I make an effort to appear consistent to others.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl137></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:1;height:
  15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Social Desirability - Impression Management</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Paulhus, D. L. (1991). Measurement
  and control of response bias. In J. P. Robinson, P. Shaver, &amp; L. S.
  Wrightsman (Eds.), <font class="font9">Measures of Personality and Social
  Psychological Attitudes</font><font class="font10">. San Diego: Academic
  Press.</font></td>
  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Don’t gossip about other people’s business.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:1;height:
  15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Social Desirability - Self-Deceptive Enhancement</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Paulhus, D. L. (1991). Measurement
  and control of response bias. In J. P. Robinson, P. Shaver, &amp; L. S.
  Wrightsman (Eds.), <font class="font9">Measures of Personality and Social
  Psychological Attitudes</font><font class="font10">. San Diego: Academic
  Press.</font></td>
  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Don't care to know what other people really think of me.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl84 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Psychopathy</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl151 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=14 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Levenson M. R., Kiehl, K. A., &amp;
  Fitzpatrick, C. M. (1995). Assessing Psychopathic Attributes in a
  Non-institutionalised Population.<font class="font9"> Journal of Personality
  and Social Psychology, 68</font><font class="font10"> (1), 151-158.</font></td>
  <td colspan=43 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I feel bad if my words or actions cause someone else to feel
  emotional pain.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>For me, what’s right is whatever I can get away with.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl111 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Success is based on survival of the fittest; I am not
  concerned about the losers.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
