 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Support for income redistribution</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=36 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: Gallup Poll items: Do
  you think our government should or should not redistribute wealth by heavy
  taxes on the rich? --- Do you feel that the distribution of money and wealth
  in this country today is fair, or do you feel that the money and wealth in
  this country should be more evenly distributed among a larger percentage of
  the people?
  http://www.gallup.com/poll/111655/americans-split-redistributing-wealth-taxing-rich.aspx</td>
  <td colspan=21 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Redistributing money and wealth more evenly among a larger
  percentage of the people in New Zealand through heavy taxes on the rich.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Flat tax policy</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl121 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl129 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl129 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl129 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl189 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Perry, R., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2013). A dual-process motivational model of social and economic policy
  attitudes. Analyses of Social Issues and Public Policy, 13, 262-285.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>A “flat” tax rate (everyone pays the same percentage of tax
  on their income).</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl133 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl138 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl189 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Legalization of Cannabis</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=19 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Little, A. (2019). 2020 Cannabis
  Referendum. Proactive Release Cabinet Paper, Ministry of Justice.
  https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/5990903-Proactive-Release-Cabinet-Paper-2020-Cannabis.html
  [wording from option as listed in]</td>
  <td colspan=38 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Do you support legalising the personal use of recreational
  cannabis?</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Hate Speech</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td>Developed for NZAVS [Kumar &amp; Chris]</td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>People who hold opinions that are harmful or offensive to
  minority groups should be banned from expressing those views publicly.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Free Speech</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Although I may disagree with the opinions that other people
  hold, they should be allowed to express those views publicly.</td>

 <tr height=20 style='height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl159>Crime and Justice-related attitudes</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl161 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl161 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl161 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl161 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl162>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Institutional trust in police</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl98 colspan=10 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Tyler, T. R. (2005).
  Policing in black and white: Ethnic group differences in trust and confidence
  in the police.&nbsp;<font class="font8">Police quarterly</font><font
  class="font6">,&nbsp;</font><font class="font8">8</font><font class="font6">(3),
  322-342.</font></td>
  <td colspan=47 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>People’s basic rights are well protected by the New Zealand
  Police.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl134 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl137></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>There are many things about the New Zealand Police and its
  policies that need to be changed.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Compliance with police</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl98 colspan=10 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Tyler, T. R. (2005).
  Policing in black and white: Ethnic group differences in trust and confidence
  in the police.&nbsp;<font class="font8">Police quarterly</font><font
  class="font6">,&nbsp;</font><font class="font8">8</font><font class="font6">(3),
  322-342.</font></td>
  <td colspan=47 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl181 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I would always report dangerous or suspicious activities
  occurring in my neighbourhood to the police.</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Three-strikes law for criminals</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td>Developed for NZAVS</td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl181 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The current ‘3 Strikes’ law for violent/sexual offences,
  where the maximum possible sentence must be imposed without parole upon the
  third conviction.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Domestic violence</td>

  <td class=xl94 colspan=32 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., Greaves,

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>2009 citizen initiated anti-smacking referendum item</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=18 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Dittman, C., Sibley, C. G., &amp;
  Farruggia, S. (2013). Attitudes toward smacking in a New Zealand probability
  sample: psychological and demographic correlates. New Zealand Journal of

  <td colspan=39 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl181 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Should a smack as part of good parental correction be a

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Attitudes towards smacking for disciplinary purposes</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>

 <tr height=20 style='height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl159>Ethnic Group Attitudes</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Ethnic identity centrality</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td colspan=22 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Leach, C.W., van Zomeren, M.,
  Zebel, S., Vliek, M. L. W., Pennekamp, S. F., Doosje, B.,... Spears, R.
  (2008). Group-level self-definition and self-investment: A hierarchical
  (multicomponent) model of ingroup identification. <font class="font9">Journal
  of Personality and Social Psychology, 95, </font><font class="font10">144-165.</font></td>
  <td colspan=35 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I often think about the fact that I am a member of my ethnic
  group.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Symbolic threat perception</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=19 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Stephan, W. G., Boniecki, K. A.,
  Ybarra, O., Bettencourt, A., Ervin, K. S., Jackson, L. A., McNatt, P. S.,
  &amp; Renfro, C. L. (2002). The role of threats in the racial attitudes of
  Blacks and Whites. <font class="font9">Personality and Social Psychology
  Bulletin, 28,</font><font class="font10"> 1242-1254.</font></td>
  <td colspan=38 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Ethnic label preference for NZers of European descent</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>

  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Racial Essentialism</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl119 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=17 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>No, S., Hong, Y-Y., Liao, H-Y.,
  Lee, K., Wood, D., &amp; Chao, M. M. (2008). Lay theory of race affects and
  moderated Asian Americans’ responses toward American culture. <font
  class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 95,</font><font
  class="font10"> 991-1004.</font></td>
  <td colspan=40 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>To a large extent, a person’s race biologically determines
  his or her abilities.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Race-based rejection sensitivity</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td colspan=11 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Shelton, J. N., &amp; Richeson, J.
  A. (2005). Intergroup Contact and Pluralistic Ignorance. <font class="font9">Journal
  of Personality and Social Psychology, 88</font><font class="font10">(1),
  91-107.</font></td>
  <td colspan=46 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Ethnic subgroup respect</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=19 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: Huo, Y. J., Molina,
  L. E., Binning, K. R., &amp; Funge, S. P. (2010). Subgroup respect, social
  engagement, and well-being: A field study of an ethnically diverse high
  school. <font class="font9">Cultural Diversity and Ethnic Minority
  Psychology, 16, </font><font class="font10">427-436.</font></td>
  <td colspan=38 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Do you think most New Zealanders respect the achievements of
  your ethnic group?</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Most New Zealanders respect the achievements of my ethnic
  group.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Ethnic group narcissism</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=14 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>de Zavala, A. G., Cichocka, A.,
  Eidelson, R., &amp; Jayawickreme, N. (2009). Collective narcissism and its
  social consequences. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 97, </font><font class="font10">1074-1096.</font></td>
  <td colspan=43 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I insist upon my ethnic group getting the respect that is due
  to it.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>If my ethnic group had a major say in the world, the world
  would be a much better place.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The true worth of my ethnic group is often misunderstood.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Immigrant Atttiudes<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Brugelmans, S. M., &amp; van de
  Vijver, F. J. R. (2004). Antecedents and components of majority attitudes
  toward multiculturalism in the Netherlands. <font class="font8">Applied
  Psychology: An International Review, 53,</font><font class="font6"> 400-422.</font></td>
  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The unity of New Zealand is weakened by too many immigrants.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I feel at ease when I am in a city district in New Zealand
  with many immigrants.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Ethnic Collective Action</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td colspan=24 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: Cronin, T. J., Levin,
  S., Branscombe, N. R., van Laar, C., &amp; Tropp, L. R. (2012). Ethnic
  identification in response to perceived discrimination protects well-being
  and promotes activism: A longitudinal study of Latino college students. Group
  Processes and Intergroup Relations, 15, 393-407.</td>
  <td colspan=33 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>

 <tr class=xl102 height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl103 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl90>Support for Māori Political mobilization</td>
  <td class=xl128 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl128 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl128 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl90 colspan=18 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Osborne, D., &amp;
  Sibley, C. G. (2013). Through rose-coloured glasses: system-justifying
  beliefs dampen the effects of relative deprivation on well-being and
  political mobilization. Personality and Social Psychology Bulletin, 39,
  991-1004.</td>
  <td class=xl102></td>
  <td class=xl102></td>
  <td class=xl102></td>

  <td class=xl102></td>
  <td class=xl102></td>

  <td class=xl102></td>
  <td class=xl102></td>
  <td class=xl102></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Modern Racism (Māori) - Denial of Discrimination</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl93 colspan=15 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>McConahay, J. B. (1986).
  Modern racism, ambivalence, and the Modern Racism Scale. In J. Dovidio &amp;
  S. Gaertner (Eds.), <font class="font8">Prejudice, discrimination, and racism
  </font><font class="font6">(pp. 91–125)</font><font class="font8">. </font><font
  class="font6">Orlando, FL: Academic Press.</font></td>
  <td colspan=42 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  <td colspan=40 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Intergroup Contact</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl151 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=17 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Barlow, F. K., Hornsey, M.,
  Hayward, L., Houkamau, C. A., Kang, J., Milojev, P., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2019). Why do we hold mixed emotions about racial outgroups? A case for
  affect matching. Psychological Science, 30(6), 917-929.</td>
  <td colspan=40 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  <td colspan=19 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sengupta, N. K., Barlow, F. K.,

  outgroup contact ameliorates symbolic exclusion but not historical negation. <font

 <tr height=20 style='height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl159>Gender and Sexuality-Related Attitudes</td>
  <td class=xl160 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl162>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Gender identity centrality</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td colspan=22 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Leach, C.W., van Zomeren, M.,
  Zebel, S., Vliek, M. L. W., Pennekamp, S. F., Doosje, B.,... Spears, R.
  (2008). Group-level self-definition and self-investment: A hierarchical
  (multicomponent) model of ingroup identification. <font class="font9">Journal
  of Personality and Social Psychology, 95, </font><font class="font10">144-165.</font></td>
  <td colspan=35 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl181 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Being a woman/man is an important part of how I see myself.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Benevolent sexism</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Glick, P., &amp; Fiske, S. T.
  (1996). The Ambivalent Sexism Inventory: Differentiating hostile and
  benevolent sexism. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 70,</font><font class="font10"> 491-512.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Women, compared to men, tend to have greater moral
  sensibility.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Many women have a quality of purity that few men possess.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Women, as compared to men, tend to have a more refined sense
  of culture and good taste.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Women should be cherished and protected by men.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Every man ought to have a woman whom he adores.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Hostile sexism</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>5</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Gender income and employment opportunity</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Introducing a programme to enhance sustainable business
  growth among businesses owned and operated by women.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Attitudes toward homosexuality</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=5 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: Pew Forum on Religion
  &amp; Public Life U.S. Religious Landscape Survey<span
  style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td colspan=52 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think that homosexuality should be accepted by society.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Social Dominance Orientation</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>

  <td colspan=11 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sidanius, J., &amp; Pratto, F.
  (1999). Social dominance: An intergroup theory of social hierarchy and
  oppression. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press.</td>
  <td colspan=46 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>It is OK if some groups have more of a chance in life than
  others.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Inferior groups should stay in their place.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>To get ahead in life, it is sometimes okay to step on other
  groups.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>We should have increased social equality.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>It would be good if groups could be equal.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>We should do what we can to equalise conditions for different
  groups.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl180 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Right-Wing Authoritarianism</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td colspan=5 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Altemeyer, B. (1996). <font
  class="font9">The authoritarian spectre.</font><font class="font10"> London:
  Harvard University Press.</font></td>
  <td colspan=52 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>It is always better to trust the judgment of the proper
  authorities in government and religion than to listen to the noisy
  rabble-rousers in our society who are trying to create doubt in people's
  minds.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>It would be best for everyone if the proper authorities
  censored magazines so that people could not get their hands on trashy and
  disgusting material.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Our country will be destroyed some day if we do not smash the
  perversions eating away at our moral fibre and traditional beliefs.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>People should pay less attention to The Bible and other old
  traditional forms of religious guidance, and instead develop their own
  personal standards of what is moral and immoral.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Atheists and others who have rebelled against established
  religions are no doubt every bit as good and virtuous as those who attend
  church regularly.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Some of the best people in our country are those who are
  challenging our government, criticizing religion, and ignoring the
  &quot;normal way&quot; things are supposed to be done.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Colour-blind ideology</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>3</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=15 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Knowles, E.D., Lowery, B.S., Hogan,
  C.M., &amp; Chow, R.M. (2009). On the malleability of ideology: motivated
  construals of color blindness. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and
  Social Psychology, 96, </font><font class="font10">857-869.</font></td>
  <td colspan=42 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I wish people in this society would stop obsessing so much
  about race.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>People who become preoccupied by race are forgetting that
  we’re all just human.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Putting racial labels on people obscures the fact that
  everyone is a unique individual.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
