  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Human Rights Restrictions</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=9 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Adapted From: McFarland, S., &amp;
  Mathews, M. (2005). Who Cares About Human Rights? Political Psychology,
  26(3), 365-385.<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td colspan=48 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Some people are simply not responsible enough to own

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Moral foundations Harm<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>

  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Graham, J., Haidt, J., &amp; Nosek,
  B. A. (2009). Liberals and conservatives rely on different sets of moral
  foundations. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 96,</font><font class="font10"> 1029-1046.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Moral foundations Fairness</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Graham, J., Haidt, J., &amp; Nosek,
  B. A. (2009). Liberals and conservatives rely on different sets of moral
  foundations. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 96,</font><font class="font10"> 1029-1046.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>When the government makes laws, the number one principle
  should be ensuring that everyone is treated fairly.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think it's morally wrong that rich children inherit a lot
  of money while poor children inherit nothing</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Someone was denied his or her rights</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Moral foundations Ingroup loyalty</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Graham, J., Haidt, J., &amp; Nosek,
  B. A. (2009). Liberals and conservatives rely on different sets of moral
  foundations. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 96,</font><font class="font10"> 1029-1046.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Moral foundations Purity</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Moral foundations Authority</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Graham, J., Haidt, J., &amp; Nosek,
  B. A. (2009). Liberals and conservatives rely on different sets of moral
  foundations. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality and Social
  Psychology, 96,</font><font class="font10"> 1029-1046.</font></td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Respect for authority is something all children need to learn</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Patriotism<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td colspan=9 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Kosterman, R., &amp; Feshbach, S.
  (1989). Toward a measure of patriotic and nationalistic attitudes. <font
  class="font9">Political Psychology, 10, </font><font class="font10">257-274.</font></td>
  <td colspan=48 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I feel a great pride in the land that is our New Zealand.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Although at times I may not agree with the government, my
  commitment to New Zealand always remains strong.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Nationalism</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>2</td>
  <td colspan=9 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Kosterman, R., &amp; Feshbach, S.
  (1989). Toward a measure of patriotic and nationalistic attitudes. <font

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Generally, the more influence NZ has on other nations, the
  better off they are.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Foreign nations have done some very fine things but they are
  still not as good as New Zealand.</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=19 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:1;height:
  14.25pt'>
  <td height=19 class=xl92 style='height:14.25pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>National identification</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl95 colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Postmes, T., Haslam, S.
  A., &amp; Jans, L. (2013). A single‐item measure of social identification:
  Reliability, validity, and utility. British Journal of Social Psychology,
  52(4), 597-617.</td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=19 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:14.25pt'>
  <td height=19 class=xl139 style='height:14.25pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I identify with New Zealand.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Identity Threat</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td>Developed for the NZAVS</td>
  <td colspan=56 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>When I meet new people in New Zealand, they often assume that
  I am a foreigner.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Willingness to fight for one's country (war)</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=9 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Inglehart, R. (Ed.).
  (2004).&nbsp;Human beliefs and values: A cross-cultural sourcebook based on
  the 1999-2002 values surveys. Siglo XXI.</td>
  <td colspan=48 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Of course, we all hope that there will not be another war,
  but if it were to come to that, would you be willing to fight for your
  country?</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl131 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl116 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

 <tr height=21 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:16.0pt'>
  <td height=21 class=xl92 style='height:16.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl91 width=1380 style='width:1035pt'>Civic and ethnic national
  character</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=21 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:16.0pt'>
  <td height=21 class=xl92 style='height:16.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl91 width=1380 style='width:1035pt'>NZ specific national character</td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl125 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl127 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:

  <td class=xl98 colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C.<font
  class="font12"> </font><font class="font11">G., Hoverd, W. J., &amp; Liu, J.
  H. (2011). Pluralistic and monocultural facets of New Zealand national

  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>To have a knowledge of Māori culture.</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>To be egalitarian – believe in equality.</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Rugby national identity</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>

  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl118 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'><s style='visibility:
  hidden;mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td class=xl136 style='border-top:none'><s style='visibility:hidden;
  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>
  <td colspan=3 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>As used by Marc Wilson in his Sunday
  Star Times survey</td>
  <td colspan=54 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I think liking rugby is an important part of being a ‘true’
  New Zealander.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  mso-ignore:visibility'>&nbsp;</s></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>All Blacks rugby positivity</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>1</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  Star Times survey</td>
  <td colspan=54 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Generally speaking, how positive or negative do you feel
  about the All Blacks?</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td>All Blacks rugby likelihood of world cup win</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  Star Times survey</td>

 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Identification with community</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=14 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>McFarland, S., Webb, M., &amp;
  Brown, D. (2012). All humanity is my ingroup: A measure and studies of
  identification with all humanity. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality
  and Social Psychology, 103,</font><font class="font10"> xxx-xxx.</font></td>
  <td colspan=43 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Identification with New Zealanders</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>9</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=14 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>McFarland, S., Webb, M., &amp;
  Brown, D. (2012). All humanity is my ingroup: A measure and studies of
  identification with all humanity. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality
  and Social Psychology, 103,</font><font class="font10"> xxx-xxx.</font></td>
  <td colspan=43 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>How much would you say you have in common with the following

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Identification with all humanity</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>9</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=14 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>McFarland, S., Webb, M., &amp;
  Brown, D. (2012). All humanity is my ingroup: A measure and studies of
  identification with all humanity. <font class="font9">Journal of Personality
  and Social Psychology, 103,</font><font class="font10"> xxx-xxx.</font></td>
  <td colspan=43 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>How close do you feel to each of the following groups… people
  all over the world.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>How much do you believe in … being loyal to all humankind?</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=15 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Sibley, C. G., &amp; Bulbulia, J.
  (2012). Faith after an earthquake: a longitudinal study of religion and

  earthquake. <font class="font8">PLoS ONE, 7,</font><font class="font6">
  e49648.</font></td>
  <td colspan=42 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I wish I could hide the fact that I am Māori from
  other people.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) My Māori ancestry is important to me.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Being Māori is NOT important to who I am as a person.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Being Māori is NOT important to my sense of what kind
  of person I am.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Socio-political consciousness</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.
  G. (2010). The Multi-Dimensional Model of Māori Identity and Cultural
  Engagement. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 39, 8-28.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Māori would be heaps better off if they just forgot
  about the past and moved on.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) All of us, both Māori and Pakeha, did bad things in
  the past—we should all just forget about it.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I’m sick of hearing about the Treaty of Waitangi and
  how Māori had their land stolen.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think we should all just be New Zealanders and
  forget about differences between Māori and Pakeha.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think that Māori have been wronged in the past, and
  that we should stand up for what is ours.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) What the European settlers did to Māori in the past
  has nothing to do with me personally. I wasn’t there and I don’t think it
  affects me at all.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I stand up for Māori rights.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) It’s important for Māori to stand together and be
  strong if we want to claim back the lands that were taken from us.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Cultural efficacy and active identity engagement</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.
  G. (2010). The Multi-Dimensional Model of Māori Identity and Cultural
  Engagement. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 39, 8-28.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I don’t know how to act like a real Māori on a marae.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I can’t do Māori cultural stuff properly.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Spirituality</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.
  G. (2010). The Multi-Dimensional Model of Māori Identity and Cultural
  Engagement. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 39, 8-28.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I believe that Tupuna (ancient ancestors) can
  communicate with you if they want to.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I don’t believe in that Māori spiritual stuff.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I believe that my Taha Wairua (my spiritual side) is
  an important part of my Māori identity.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I can sense it when I am in a Tapu place.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I can sometimes feel my Māori ancestors watching over
  me.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I have never felt a spiritual connection with my
  ancestors.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think Tapu is just a made up thing. It can’t
  actually affect you.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I feel a strong spiritual association with the land.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Interdependent self-concept</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>7</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>7</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.
  G. (2010). The Multi-Dimensional Model of Māori Identity and Cultural
  Engagement. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 39, 8-28.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) My relationships with other Māori people (friends and
  family) are what make me Māori.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I consider myself Māori because I am interconnected
  with other Māori people, including friends and family.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) My Māori identity is fundamentally about my
  relationships with other Māori.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) For me, a big part of being Māori is my relationships
  with other Māori people.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
