  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) How I see myself is totally tied up with my
  relationships with my Māori friends and family.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) My Māori identity belongs to me personally. It has
  nothing to do with my relationships with other Māori.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Reciprocity (give-and-take) is at the heart of what
  it means to be Māori for me.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>

 </tr>
 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Authenticity Beliefs</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>8</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.
  G. (2010). The Multi-Dimensional Model of Māori Identity and Cultural
  Engagement. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 39, 8-28.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) You can always tell true Māori from other Māori.
  They’re real different.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I reckon that true Māori hang out at their marae all
  the time.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) True Māori always do karakia (prayer) before
  important events.</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) You can tell a true Māori just by looking at them.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Real Māori put their whanau first.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) To be truly Māori you need to understand your
  whakapapa and the history of your people.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>
  <td class=xl112></td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Perceived Appearance</td>

  <td colspan=13 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Houkamau, C. A., &amp; Sibley, C.

  Engagement (MMM-ICE2). Social Indicators Research, 122, 279-296.</td>
  <td colspan=44 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think it is easy to tell that I am Māori just by
  looking at me.</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) When people meet me, they often do not realize that I
  am Māori.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:

  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think it is hard to tell that I am Māori just by

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) I think it is clear to other people when they look at
  me that I am of Māori descent.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>

  <td>Time watching Māori television</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-outline-level:2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>(Māori) Do you know the name of your hapu (sub-tribe)?</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.

  culturally-appropriate self-report measure for Pacific peoples in New
  Zealand. <font class="font8">Social Indicators Research, 112, </font><font

  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Pacific Connectedness and Belonging<span
  style='mso-spacerun:yes'> </span></td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2013). The Pacific Identity and Wellbeing Scale (PIWBS): A
  culturally-appropriate self-report measure for Pacific peoples in New
  Zealand. <font class="font8">Social Indicators Research, 112, </font><font
  class="font6">83-103</font><font class="font8">.</font></td>
  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>

  2;height:15.0pt'>

  from my island.</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I feel connected to people from a different Pacific Island to
  myself.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl117 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I feel comfortable in places with lots of other Pacific
  peoples.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl105>I feel most comfortable in Pacific communities.</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I don’t get along with other Island groups.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Religious Centrality and Embeddedness</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>6</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2013). The Pacific Identity and Wellbeing Scale (PIWBS): A
  culturally-appropriate self-report measure for Pacific peoples in New
  Zealand. <font class="font8">Social Indicators Research, 112, </font><font
  class="font6">83-103</font><font class="font8">.</font></td>
  <td colspan=41 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Going to church is part of my culture and religion.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>God has a strong connection to my culture.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Religion is not important for my culture.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl114 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>Y</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Our religion is the centre of our culture as Pacific
  Islanders.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Group Membership Evaluation</td>

  <td colspan=16 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.

  culturally-appropriate self-report measure for Pacific peoples in New

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>The fact that I am an Islander is an important part of my
  identity.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Being an Islander is an important part of how I see myself.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>Being a Pacific Islander gives me a good feeling.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl139 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl105>I am glad to be a Pacific Islander.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>

 <tr height=20 style='mso-outline-level:1;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl92 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td>Pacific Cultural Efficacy</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl108 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>4</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl110 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl124 style='border-top:none'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td colspan=12 style='mso-ignore:colspan'>Manuela, S., &amp; Sibley, C. G.
  (2015). The Pacific Identity and Wellbeing Scale—Revised: comparisons across
  Pacific groups. New Zealand Journal of Psychology, 44, 61-72.</td>
  <td colspan=45 style='mso-ignore:colspan'></td>
 </tr>
 <tr class=xl112 height=20 style='mso-height-source:userset;mso-outline-level:
  2;height:15.0pt'>
  <td height=20 class=xl182 style='height:15.0pt'>&nbsp;</td>
  <td class=xl185>I find it easy to participate in Pacific cultural events.</td>
  <td class=xl115 style='border-top:none;border-left:none'>&nbsp;</td>

  2;height:15.0pt'>

  <td class=xl185>I feel I am easily able to express who I am as a Pacific

References

Corrections

If you see mistakes or want to suggest changes, please create an issue on the source repository.

Reuse

Text and figures are licensed under Creative Commons Attribution CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Source code is available at https://github.com/go-bayes/reports, unless otherwise noted. The figures that have been reused from other sources don't fall under this license and can be recognized by a note in their caption: "Figure from ...".

Citation

For attribution, please cite this work as

Bulbulia (2021, Feb. 28). Reports: New Zealand Attitudes and Values Study. Retrieved from https://go-bayes.github.io/reports/posts/nzavs/

@misc{bulbulia2021new,
  author = {Bulbulia, Joseph},
  title = {Reports: New Zealand Attitudes and Values Study},
  url = {https://go-bayes.github.io/reports/posts/nzavs/},
  year = {2021}
